dependencies: Suppliers of important technologies and components
Global supply chain for IT hardware and materials
risks: Global supply chain issues and inflationary pressures disrupting supply and increasing prices
Subcontractor performance deficiencies could result in termination for default
Dependence on teaming arrangements and relationships with other contractors and subcontractors
Supply chain disruption from physical or transition risks including natural disasters and climate change
Tariffs on imported goods and materials may increase procurement costs

regulatory_risks: Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) and supplements including DoD Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS)
Truthful Cost or Pricing Data Act compliance
Procurement Integrity Act restrictions
Civil False Claims Act violations
False Statements Act violations
U.S. government Cost Accounting Standards (CAS) compliance
International Trade in Arms Regulation (ITAR) compliance
Export Administration Regulations (EAR) and anti-boycott provisions
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
U.K. Bribery Act of 2010 compliance
Anti-corruption and anti-bribery laws in jurisdictions where business is conducted
Data privacy and security laws including GDPR (EU), U.K. GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)
DFARS cybersecurity requirements and National Institute of Standards and Technology security controls
DOD Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) program requirements
Environmental laws including Federal Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act
Organizational conflict of interest (OCI) rules
Small Business Administration set-aside program restrictions
Changes in U.S. government procurement rules and regulations
Other Transaction Authority (OTA) agreements regulations
EU Artificial Intelligence Act (AI Act)
Pillar Two global minimum tax framework (15% global minimum tax)
Import and export controls and sanctions
Employment and labor relations laws
Immigration laws
Taxation laws and regulations
Anti-competition restrictions
Securities regulation and disclosure control obligations
Climate change and environmental sustainability regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions imposed by U.S. and other nations on Russia, Belarus and certain banks, companies and individuals due to Russia-Ukraine conflict
Enhanced export controls on certain products to Russia
Potential responses from Russia to sanctions
Restrictions on international trade from geopolitical tensions
Changes in international trade policies including higher tariffs on imported goods
